Notice Of Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs Per Ccp 425.16(C)
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT YMCA SF NMTC, INC'S Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs Per CCP 425.16(C). Appearances: Susan Bush, Esq. of Rosenquest & Associates (415) 292-0980, appearing for Defendant and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Notice Of Special Motion And Special Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT YMCA SF NMTC, INC.'S Special Motion To Strike Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 425.16.
APPEARANCES: Nils Rosenquest, Esq. of Rosenquest & Associates 292-0980 for deft & moving party; Don L. Whitney, 407-8369 pltf & opposing party in propria persona (appeared late, after the Court ruled).
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
